address: Apartment 8, Burgess Mill, 20 Manchester Street, Derby, DE23 6XL
lead_profile_text: 3-bed flat managed by Hello Guest since December 2025. Only 3 reviews in 5+ months; last-minute/same-day bookings disabled; extremely poor platform visibility. Previous self-management (1 year) achieved better booking rates. Break-even requirement: 14-16 nights/month. Gated car park with CCTV currently available but not advertised in listing. Financial pressure cited in relation to 6-month minimum term.
emotional_profile: Risk-averse about commitment terms due to Hello Guest failure. Frustrated by high-volume impersonal management. Motivated by better performance, immediate transition capability, and zero upfront fees.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (reduced from 15%+VAT standard) if signed by 31 May 2026; no onboarding fees; June 1st start date proposed. 6-month minimum term, 3-month notice.
